## ⚠️ STOP

**Do not file security vulnerabilities as public GitHub issues.**

Email **contact@kovetz.co.il** instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md)
for our disclosure policy.

We will:
1. Acknowledge receipt within 3 business days
2. Confirm or refute the issue within 14 days
3. Coordinate fix and disclosure with you
4. Credit you in the changelog (unless you prefer otherwise)
